name: Soshiro Hoshina
description: Soshiro Hoshina (保ほ科しな 宗そう四し郎ろう, Hoshina Sōshirō) is the vice-captain of the Third Division of the Defense Force, and a member of the Hoshina Family, a renowned clan of swordsmen from the Muromachi period. He is also Soichiro Hoshina's younger brother.
creator: Feifrey
